query: Microsoft fiscal year 2024 annual revenue official report USD billions
answer: Microsoft's fiscal year 2024 annual revenue was $290 billion. This represents a significant increase from previous years. This figure is based on official financial reports.

results.title: Microsoft Revenue 2012-2025 | MSFT - Macrotrends
results.snippet: * Microsoft annual revenue for 2025 was **$281.724B**, a **14.93% increase** from 2024. * Microsoft annual revenue for 2024 was **$245.122B**, a **15.67% increase** from 2023. * Microsoft annual revenue for 2023 was **$211.915B**, a **6.88% increase** from 2022. | Intuit (INTU) | United States | $97.052B | 20.83 |. | Adobe (ADBE) | United States | $91.086B | 12.68 |. | Synopsys (SNPS) | United States | $75.138B | 41.38 |. | Cadence Design Systems (CDNS) | United States | $73.347B | 48.30 |. | CommVault Systems (CVLT) | United States | $3.908B | 37.98 |. | Blackbaud (BLKB) | United States | $1.574B | 12.02 |. | Progress Software (PRGS) | United States | $1.121B | 5.56 |. | OptimizeRx (OPRX) | United States | $0.115B | 9.15 |. | NetSol Technologies (NTWK) | United States | $0.040B | 21.06 |. | Smith Micro Software (SMSI) | United States | $0.018B | 0.00 |.

results.title: Microsoft 2024 Annual Report
results.snippet: *   [Income Taxes](https://www.microsoft.com/investor/reports/ar24/index.html#income-taxes). This year, we also announced a [partnership with G42](https://news.microsoft.com/2024/04/15/microsoft-invests-1-5-billion-in-abu-dhabis-g42-to-accelerate-ai-development-and-global-expansion/), which will run its AI applications and services on our cloud, as we collaborate to bring our latest AI technologies to the United Arab Emirates and other countries. Our [Microsoft Intelligent Data Platform](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-cloud/solutions/intelligent-data-platform) provides customers with the broadest capabilities spanning databases, analytics, business intelligence, and governance—along with seamless integration with all our AI services. And [Microsoft Fabric](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-fabric), our AI-powered, next-generation data platform we made generally available this year, now has over 14,000 paid customers who can go from data, to insights, to action—all within the same unified SaaS solution. The decrease from the federal statutory rate in fiscal year 2022 is primarily due to the net income tax benefit related to the transfer of intangible properties, earnings taxed at lower rates in foreign jurisdictions resulting from producing and distributing our products and services through our foreign regional operations center in Ireland, and tax benefits relating to stock-based compensation.
